title: soul
body:
![bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0771abcaff599956d0b2a3a1504fc8d7b8f44674.png)![spektor sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee594c2d8a3da90923935ed5eb72a2977345b74.png)This mod adds several new weapons and items.

________________________

Soul is a Fabric mod, which means it requires the Fabric Loader. If you are using a third-party launcher, it probably has built-in functionality to automatically install mod loaders. Once you have installed Fabric Loader, you can simply place Soul into your mods folder like anything else.

________________________

How to report issues:

To report problems, follow this link and contact me, I will try to fix the problem or bug in the mod, or help you

[https://t.me/funte1](https://t.me/funte1)
________________________


if you want to support me, then go to my DonationAlerts

[https://www.donationalerts.com/r/funter00034](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/funter00034)
